sentence: 绳子打成了死结，怎么也解不开。
pinyin: Shéngzi dǎ chéng le sǐjié, zěnme yě jiě bù kāi.
english: The rope was tied into a tight knot that couldn't be undone.

sentence: 她在大学学习地球化学专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué xuéxí dìqiú huàxué zhuānyè.
english: She studies geochemistry at university.

sentence: 表格最后一栏是备注，可以填写说明。
pinyin: Biǎogé zuìhòu yī lán shì bèizhù, kěyǐ tiánxiě shuōmíng.
english: The last column of the form is for remarks where you can fill in notes.

meaning: 1. to investigate thoroughly; 2. to carefully inspect; 3. to verify; 4
sentence: 仓库管理员正在清查库存物品。
pinyin: Cāngkù guǎnlǐyuán zhèngzài qīngchá kùcún wùpǐn.
english: The warehouse manager is conducting a thorough inventory check.

sentence: 这种土壤酸性较强，不适合种植。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng tǔrǎng suānxìng jiào qiáng, bù shìhé zhòngzhí.
english: This soil is quite acidic and not suitable for planting.

meaning: 1. old, well-known brand; 2. old style; 3. old school; 4. an old hand;
sentence: 这是一家老牌茶馆。
pinyin: Zhè shì yī jiā lǎopái cháguǎn.
english: This is a long-established teahouse.

sentence: 这件大衣需要干洗，不能水洗。
pinyin: Zhè jiàn dàyī xūyào gānxǐ, bù néng shuǐxǐ.
english: This coat needs to be dry cleaned; it cannot be washed with water.

sentence: 诚实是一种普世价值观。
pinyin: Chéngshí shì yī zhǒng pǔshì jiàzhíguān.
english: Honesty is a universal value.

sentence: 这部先导片吸引了很多观众的关注。
pinyin: Zhè bù xiāndǎo piàn xīyǐn le hěn duō guānzhòng de guānzhù.
english: This pilot episode attracted a lot of viewer attention.

sentence: 这篇论文在页面底部加了详细注脚。
pinyin: Zhè piān lùnwén zài yèmiàn dǐbù jiā le xiángxì zhùjiǎo.
english: This paper added detailed footnotes at the bottom of the page.

meaning: 1. to pixelate an image; 2. to key in captcha authentication codes
sentence: 编辑对视频中的车牌进行了打码。
pinyin: Biānjí duì shìpín zhōng de chēpái jìnxíng le dǎmǎ.
english: The editor pixelated the license plates in the video.

sentence: 警察和歹徒之间发生了激烈枪战。
pinyin: Jǐngchá hé dǎitú zhījiān fāshēng le jīliè qiāngzhàn.
english: An intense gun battle broke out between police and criminals.

sentence: 他是一名经验丰富的程序员。
pinyin: Tā shì yī míng jīngyàn fēngfù de chéngxùyuán.
english: He is an experienced programmer.

sentence: 三月份天气开始变暖了。
pinyin: Sān yuèfèn tiānqì kāishǐ biàn nuǎn le.
english: The weather starts to warm up in March.

sentence: 我表弟比我小三岁。
pinyin: Wǒ biǎodì bǐ wǒ xiǎo sān suì.
english: My younger male cousin is three years younger than me.

sentence: 孩子们在游乐场玩得很开心。
pinyin: Háizimen zài yóulèchǎng wán de hěn kāixīn.
english: The children are having a great time at the playground.

sentence: 她把绳子打结固定在树上。
pinyin: Tā bǎ shéngzi dǎjié gùdìng zài shù shàng.
english: She tied a knot in the rope to secure it to the tree.

sentence: 他生气时常说脏话。
pinyin: Tā shēngqì shí cháng shuō zānghuà.
english: He often uses profanity when he's angry.

sentence: 农场里饲养着各种家畜。
pinyin: Nóngchǎng lǐ sìyǎng zhe gèzhǒng jiāchù.
english: Various livestock are raised on the farm.

sentence: 水在零度以下会变成固态。
pinyin: Shuǐ zài líng dù yǐxià huì biànchéng gùtài.
english: Water turns into a solid state below zero degrees.

sentence: 河床底部有大量的泥沙沉积。
pinyin: Héchuáng dǐbù yǒu dàliàng de níshā chénjī.
english: There is a large amount of silt sediment at the bottom of the riverbed.

sentence: 请在正确答案上画一个圆圈。
pinyin: Qǐng zài zhèngquè dá'àn shàng huà yī gè yuánquān.
english: Please draw a circle around the correct answer.

sentence: 学生们在校园里植树，保护环境。
pinyin: Xuéshengmen zài xiàoyuán lǐ zhíshù, bǎohù huánjìng.
english: Students plant trees on campus to protect the environment.

sentence: 他等得心急巴巴地不停看手机。
pinyin: Tā děng de xīnjí bābā de bù tíng kàn shǒujī.
english: He was extremely anxious waiting and kept checking his phone.

sentence: 工人正在焊接两块金属板。
pinyin: Gōngrén zhèngzài hànjiē liǎng kuài jīnshǔ bǎn.
english: The worker is welding two metal plates together.

meaning: 1. fully; 2. no less than; 3. as much as; 4. extremely
sentence: 他在图书馆待了足足三个小时。
pinyin: Tā zài túshūguǎn dāi le zúzú sān gè xiǎoshí.
english: He stayed in the library for a full three hours.

sentence: 工程师计算了桥梁各部分的应力。
pinyin: Gōngchéngshī jìsuàn le qiáoliáng gè bùfen de yìnglì.
english: The engineer calculated the stress in each part of the bridge.

sentence: 实验室检测出样本中含有杆菌。
pinyin: Shíyànshì jiǎncè chū yàngběn zhōng hányǒu gǎnjūn.
english: The laboratory detected bacilli in the sample.

sentence: 政府打击邪教活动保护民众。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ dǎjī xiéjiào huódòng bǎohù mínzhòng.
english: The government cracks down on evil cult activities to protect the public.

sentence: 不要只看表象，要深入思考。
pinyin: Bùyào zhǐ kàn biǎoxiàng, yào shēnrù sīkǎo.
english: Don't just look at the surface appearance; think more deeply.

sentence: 从山顶可以看到城市的全景。
pinyin: Cóng shāndǐng kěyǐ kàndào chéngshì de quánjǐng.
english: From the mountaintop you can see a panoramic view of the city.

sentence: 上海是中国最繁华的大都市之一。
pinyin: Shànghǎi shì Zhōngguó zuì fánhuá de dàdūshì zhīyī.
english: Shanghai is one of China's most bustling metropolises.

meaning: 1. to permute; 2. permutation (math.); 3. to displace; 4. displacement
sentence: 他把旧手机置换成了最新款。
pinyin: Tā bǎ jiù shǒujī zhìhuàn chéngle zuì xīn kuǎn.
english: He traded in his old phone for the latest model.

meaning: 1. rich and powerful (families); 2. aristocratic; 3. big shots
sentence: 这部电视剧讲的是豪门家族的故事。
pinyin: Zhè bù diànshìjù jiǎng de shì háomén jiāzú de gùshi.
english: This TV drama is about the story of a wealthy and powerful family.

meaning: 1. to take a breath (in swimming); 2. to ventilate
sentence: 游泳时要学会正确的换气方法。
pinyin: Yóuyǒng shí yào xuéhuì zhèngquè de huànqì fāngfǎ.
english: When swimming, you need to learn the correct breathing technique.

meaning: 1. to keep stationed (of troops); 2. to remain as a garrison
sentence: 部队留驻在边境地区已经一年了。
pinyin: Bùduì liúzhù zài biānjìng dìqū yǐjīng yī nián le.
english: The troops have been stationed at the border region for a year.

sentence: 他的脸孔看起来很熟悉。
pinyin: Tā de liǎnkǒng kànqǐlái hěn shúxī.
english: His face looks very familiar.

meaning: 1. to stay; 2. to remain; 3. to linger; 4. (computing) to reside; 5. r
sentence: 这个程序会驻留在内存中运行。
pinyin: Zhège chéngxù huì zhùliú zài nèicún zhōng yùnxíng.
english: This program runs resident in memory.

sentence: 这种材料的刚性非常强，不容易弯曲。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng cáiliào de gāngxìng fēicháng qiáng, bù róngyì wānqū.
english: This material has very high rigidity and doesn't bend easily.

sentence: 太阳能电池板可以把热能转化为电能。
pinyin: Tàiyángnéng diànchíbǎn kěyǐ bǎ rènéng zhuǎnhuà wéi diànnéng.
english: Solar panels can convert heat energy into electrical energy.

meaning: 1. to keep; 2. to preserve; 3. extant; 4. to remain (from the past)
sentence: 这些古代文献至今仍然留存完好。
pinyin: Zhèxiē gǔdài wénxiàn zhìjīn réngrán liúcún wánhǎo.
english: These ancient documents have remained preserved and intact to this day.

sentence: 科学家们去极地考察了三个月。
pinyin: Kēxuéjiāmen qù jídì kǎochá le sān gè yuè.
english: The scientists went to the polar region for a three-month expedition.

sentence: 这款手环有传感功能，能检测心率。
pinyin: Zhè kuǎn shǒuhuán yǒu chuángǎn gōngnéng, néng jiǎncè xīnlǜ.
english: This wristband has sensing capabilities and can detect heart rate.

sentence: 电视的控制面板在右侧。
pinyin: Diànshì de kòngzhì miànbǎn zài yòucè.
english: The TV's control panel is on the right side.

meaning: 1. to defeat; 2. to inflict a defeat on sb
sentence: 主队在昨晚的比赛中大败对手。
pinyin: Zhǔduì zài zuówǎn de bǐsài zhōng dàbài duìshǒu.
english: The home team inflicted a crushing defeat on their opponents last night.

sentence: 她把自己的经历口述给记者听。
pinyin: Tā bǎ zìjǐ de jīnglì kǒushù gěi jìzhě tīng.
english: She recounted her experiences orally to the reporter.

sentence: 买卖象牙在很多国家是违法的。
pinyin: Mǎimài xiàngyá zài hěn duō guójiā shì wéifǎ de.
english: Trading ivory is illegal in many countries.

sentence: 这片山区人烟稀少，很少有人来。
pinyin: Zhè piàn shānqū rényān xīshǎo, hěn shǎo yǒu rén lái.
english: This mountain area has few signs of human habitation and rarely sees visitors.

sentence: 我给手机换了一张新壁纸。
pinyin: Wǒ gěi shǒujī huàn le yī zhāng xīn bìzhǐ.
english: I changed my phone's wallpaper to a new one.

sentence: 这种问题最好咨询专业人士。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng wèntí zuìhǎo zīxún zhuānyè rénshì.
english: For this kind of problem, it's best to consult a professional.
